title: Groundwork of Evangelion DIGEST
wikitext: []: Groundwork of Evangelion DIGEST             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Dec 05, 2020 7:20 am Basically a summary of the TV-show Groundworks, but with new, colored genga thrown in. Not a substitute for the old books, since at ~220 pages this throws out a lot too. It's really a "digest" as the title says. Really like the blue color choice on the cover here btw. https://twitter.com/khara_inc/status/1335189424099926017?s=19
